tagline: #BetterThanBottled — Your Trusted Water Quality and Pool Service Experts Since 1936

hero.headline: Three Generations of Pure Trust
hero.sub_headline: Since 1936, New Jersey families have relied on The Jayson Company for crystal-clear pools and water you can trust. From in-ground concrete pool service to advanced water purification, we do one thing — keep your water perfect.
checkmarks: Only NJ company certified for Perchlorate removal

services.headline: Complete Water & Pool Solutions
services.subtitle: From the water in your glass to the pool in your backyard, The Jayson Company handles it all under one roof.

cards.title: In-Ground Concrete Pool Service
cards.description: Weekly maintenance, seasonal openings and closings, equipment repair, and full renovations for your in-ground concrete pool and spa. We keep it swim-ready year-round.

cards.title: Water Softener Systems
cards.description: Professional installation and maintenance of water softening systems that eliminate hard water damage to your plumbing, appliances, and fixtures — residential, commercial, and industrial.

cards.title: Water Purification
cards.description: Advanced purification for homes and businesses. We're the only NJ company documented to successfully treat Perchlorate contamination in domestic well water supplies.

cards.title: Reverse Osmosis Systems
cards.description: State-of-the-art RO filtration that delivers clean, pure drinking water from your tap for pennies a day. Better than bottled — guaranteed.

cards.title: Pool Chemicals & Products
cards.description: Full range of professional-grade pool chemicals and maintenance products to keep your water balanced, sanitized, and crystal clear all season long.

cards.title: 24-Hour Emergency Service
cards.description: Round-the-clock emergency response for water treatment equipment failures and urgent pool issues. Service contracts and budget plans available for worry-free ownership.

steps.title: Schedule Your Assessment
steps.description: Call us or fill out the form. We'll arrange a convenient time for our certified specialist to visit your home and evaluate your water or pool needs.

steps.title: Get Your Custom Plan
steps.description: Your Jayson specialist will test your water, inspect your equipment, and present a tailored solution with transparent pricing — no surprises, no pressure.

steps.title: Enjoy Perfect Water
steps.description: Our licensed technicians handle the installation or service, then we stay with you for ongoing maintenance and 24/7 support whenever you need us.

about.label: About The Jayson Company
about.headline: Three Generations. One Mission. Perfect Water.
about.description: Founded by Cornelius Jayson in 1936, our family has spent over 90 years earning the trust of New Jersey homeowners. Today, three generations later, we remain the only water treatment company in the state documented to have successfully treated Perchlorate in domestic well water — holding contracts from both the NJ DEP and US EPA. Whether it's your pool, your drinking water, or your softener system, Jayson professionals do the job right the first time.

features.title: NJ Licensed Plumbers & Contractors
features.description: Fully licensed with NJ Plumbing License #5948 and NJ Contractors License #13VH00342000 for your complete peace of mind.

features.title: Certified Water Specialists
features.description: Water Quality Association members and Certified Water Specialists — we bring science-backed expertise to every job.

features.title: 3M Authorized with EPA Contracts
features.description: As a 3M Authorized Dealer holding NJ DEP and US EPA contracts, we meet the highest standards in the industry.

pricing.headline: Honest Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every home and pool is different. We provide free on-site assessments with clear, upfront pricing — and service contracts that save you money long-term.

guarantee.headline: The Jayson Family Promise
guarantee.description: For 90+ years, our family name has been on every truck, every invoice, and every handshake. If you're not completely satisfied with our work, we'll come back and make it right — that's not a corporate policy, it's a family promise. Your satisfaction is personal to us.

faqs.question: What areas of New Jersey do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve North and Central New Jersey including Union County, Essex County, Morris County, Hunterdon County, Somerset County, and surrounding areas. Call us to confirm service availability at your address.

faqs.question: Do you offer emergency pool and water service?
faqs.answer: Yes. We provide 24-hour emergency service for water treatment equipment failures and urgent pool issues. Service contracts and budget plans are available for worry-free coverage year-round.

faqs.question: What makes your water purification different from competitors?
faqs.answer: The Jayson Company is the only water treatment company in New Jersey documented to have successfully treated Perchlorate in domestic well water supplies. We hold contracts from both the NJ DEP and US EPA for Perchlorate removal — a distinction no other NJ company can claim.

faqs.question: How long has The Jayson Company been in business?
faqs.answer: We were founded by Cornelius Jayson in 1936 and have been family-owned and operated for over 90 years — three generations of water quality and pool service expertise right here in New Jersey.

faqs.question: Do you service all types of pools?
faqs.answer: We specialize in in-ground concrete pools and spas. Our services include weekly maintenance, seasonal openings and closings, equipment repair, renovation, and a full line of pool chemicals and products.

testimonials.name: Joanna N.
testimonials.text: My whole experience with Jayson Water Company was excellent. The water tastes fantastic. We stopped buying tons of plastic water bottles.

testimonials.name: Lynn M.
testimonials.text: They are extremely professional, knowledgeable, and offer great customer service!! Would highly recommend them to all!

testimonials.name: Bob N.
testimonials.text: Great experience with the salesman. The equipment installation went just as described and I was also very pleased with the techs.

contact.headline: Let's Talk About Your Water
contact.subtitle: Whether it's your pool, your drinking water, or a softener system — our certified specialists are ready to help.
benefits: Free on-site water assessment and consultation
Transparent pricing with no hidden fees
90+ years of family-owned expertise backing every job

footer.description: The Jayson Company has been New Jersey's trusted name in water quality and pool service since 1936. Three generations of family ownership, one commitment: perfect water for your home.
footer.service_area: Serving North and Central New Jersey including Union, Essex, Morris, Hunterdon, and Somerset Counties
